zh.lifeSummary: 當Earl "the Imperious", Jarl Of Orkney Haakon Paalson於1070年7月1日出生在英國蘇格蘭奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯時，他的父親Paul Thorfinnsson 20th Jarl of Orkney22歲，母親Thora Haakonsdatter11歲。他於大約1103年與Helga Maddannsdatter Countess of Orkney Caithnes在英國蘇格蘭奧可尼結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1103年在英國蘇格蘭奧可尼被列為earl (greve)。他去世於1122年2月2日在他的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Earl "the Imperious", Jarl Of Orkney Haakon Paalson于1070年7月1日出生在英国苏格兰奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯时，他的父亲Paul Thorfinnsson 20th Jarl of Orkney22岁，母亲Thora Haakonsdatter11岁。他于大约1103年与Helga Maddannsdatter Countess of Orkney Caithnes在英国苏格兰奧可尼结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1103年在英国苏格兰奧可尼被列为earl (greve)。他去世于1122年2月2日在他的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Paalson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): from the Middle English personal name Pole or Poul (from Latin Paulus, modern Paul) + -son; see Paul .
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Paulsson: patronymic from the personal name Paul . Compare 3 below.
Americanized form of Swedish Påhlsson or Pålsson: patronymic from the personal name På(h)l, Swedish form of Paul . Compare 2 above.

variants.name: Paul
meanings: English, French, German, Dutch, Swedish, West Indian (mainly Haiti, also e.g. Saint Lucia), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the personal name Paul (from Latin Paulus ‘small’), which has always been popular in Christendom. It was the name adopted by the Pharisee Saul of Tarsus after his conversion to Christianity on the road to Damascus in about AD 34. He was a most energetic missionary to the Gentiles in the Roman Empire, and played a very significant role in establishing Christianity as a major world religion. The name was borne also by numerous other early Christian saints. It is also occasionally borne by Jews; the reasons for this are not clear. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages and their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Greek Pavlis , Slovenian Pavel and Pavlič (see Pavlic ), Polish Paweł (see Pawel ) and Pawlicki , Assyrian/Chaldean Polous and Polus . In France, this surname is most common in Brittany (see 2 below).
Breton (mainly Finistère): from a Frenchified form of the personal name Paol, Breton form of Paul .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phóil ‘son of Paul’. Compare McFall .

nameMeanings.name: Haakon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Old Norse personal name Hákon, from hā ‘horse’ or ‘high’ + konr ‘son, descendant’; borne by Haakon VII of Norway ( 1872–1957 ), and by Crown Prince Haakon Magnus ( b. 1973 ).

variants.name: Hagen
meanings: 1 Germanic: short form of various compound names formed with hag ‘stockade, enclosure’.

variants.name: Hakon
meanings: from the Old Norse personal name Hákon, from hā ‘horse’ or ‘high’ + konr ‘son, descendant’; borne by Haakon VII of Norway ( 1872–1957 ), and by Crown Prince Haakon Magnus ( b. 1973 ).

variants.name: Håkan
meanings: from the Old Norse personal name Hákon, from hā ‘horse’ or ‘high’ + konr ‘son, descendant’; borne by Haakon VII of Norway ( 1872–1957 ), and by Crown Prince Haakon Magnus ( b. 1973 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Earl "the Imperious", Jarl Of Orkney Haakon Paalson was born on 1 July 1070, in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Paul Thorfinnsson 20th Jarl of Orkney, was 22 and his mother, Thora Haakonsdatter, was 11. He married Helga Maddannsdatter Countess of Orkney Caithnes about 1103, in Orkney, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. In 1103, his occupation is listed as earl (greve) in Orkney, Scotland, United Kingdom. He died on 2 February 1122, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Earl "the Imperious", Jarl Of Orkney Haakon Paalson est né le 1 juillet 1070, à Orkney Islands, Orkney, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Paul Thorfinnsson 20th Jarl of Orkney, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Thora Haakonsdatter, avait 11 ans. Il a épousé Helga Maddannsdatter Countess of Orkney Caithnes environ 1103, à Orkney, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. En 1103, sa profession de son indiquée est earl (greve) à Orkney, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 2 février 1122, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Earl "the Imperious", Jarl Of Orkney Haakon Paalson am 1. Juli 1070 in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Paul Thorfinnsson 20th Jarl of Orkney 22 und seine Mutter Thora Haakonsdatter 11. Er hat um 1103 in Orkney, Schottland, United Kingdom Helga Maddannsdatter Countess of Orkney Caithnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1103 ist sein Beruf als earl (greve) in Orkney, Schottland, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 2. Februar 1122 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Earl "the Imperious", Jarl Of Orkney Haakon Paalson è nato il il 1 luglio 1070 nel Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Paul Thorfinnsson 20th Jarl of Orkney, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Thora Haakonsdatter, aveva 11 anni. Lui sposato Helga Maddannsdatter Countess of Orkney Caithnes circa 1103, nel Orkney, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1103, la sua occupazione è indicata come earl (greve) nel Orkney, Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì il 2 febbraio 1122, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Earl "the Imperious", Jarl Of Orkney Haakon Paalsonが1070年7月1日にイギリススコットランドオルクニーオルクニー イスランズで生まれた時，父Paul Thorfinnsson 20th Jarl of Orkneyは22歳，母Thora Haakonsdatterは11歳であった。約1103年にイギリススコットランドオルクニーでHelga Maddannsdatter Countess of Orkney Caithnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1103年，イギリススコットランドオルクニーでの職業はearl (greve)と記録されている。彼は1122年2月2日に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Earl "the Imperious", Jarl Of Orkney Haakon Paalson(이)가 1070년 7월 1일 영국 스코틀랜드 르니 르니 이슬랜드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Paul Thorfinnsson 20th Jarl of Orkney(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Thora Haakonsdatter(은)는 11세였다. 그는 대략 1103년 영국 스코틀랜드 르니에서 Helga Maddannsdatter Countess of Orkney Caithnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1103년, 그의 직업은 영국 스코틀랜드 르니에서 earl (greve)이었다. 그는 1122년 2월 2일 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Earl "the Imperious", Jarl Of Orkney Haakon Paalson nasceu em 1 de julho de 1070, em Orkney Islands, Orkney, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Paul Thorfinnsson 20th Jarl of Orkney, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Thora Haakonsdatter, tinha 11 anos. Ele casou-se com Helga Maddannsdatter Countess of Orkney Caithnes aproximadamente 1103, em Orkney, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1103, sua profissão aparece como earl (greve) em Orkney, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1122, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Earl "the Imperious", Jarl Of Orkney Haakon Paalson родился 1 июля 1070 г. в местности орни исландс, орни, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Paul Thorfinnsson 20th Jarl of Orkney было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Thora Haakonsdatter, 11. Он женился на женщине по имени Helga Maddannsdatter Countess of Orkney Caithnes около 1103 г. в местности орни, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1103 году он работал по профессии earl (greve) в местности орни, Шотландия, Великобритания. Он умер 2 февраля 1122 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Earl "the Imperious", Jarl Of Orkney Haakon Paalson nació el 1 de julio de 1070, en Orkney Islands, Orkney, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Paul Thorfinnsson 20th Jarl of Orkney, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Thora Haakonsdatter, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Helga Maddannsdatter Countess of Orkney Caithnes aproximadamente 1103, en Orkney, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1103, su ocupación registrada era earl (greve) en Orkney, Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió el 2 de febrero de 1122, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
